prompt: Make a visual explainer showing the 5 stages of product development: 1. Discovery, 2. Design, 3. Development, 4. Testing, 5. Launch. Bold and colorful style, for Instagram Stories.

assertions.name: prompt_json_is_valid
assertions.description: prompt.json exists and is parseable JSON

assertions.name: all_five_stages_named
assertions.description: Prompt contains all 5 stage names: Discovery, Design, Development, Testing, Launch

assertions.name: bold_colorful_style
assertions.description: Prompt describes bold or colorful visual style

assertions.name: negative_blocklist_present
assertions.description: Prompt contains negative terms like 'blurry text' or 'garbled typography'
